claim_text: Full package scope is visible before payment
notes: Must stay aligned with terms and seeded deliverables

claim_text: Payment creates a brief flow and operator-visible intake
notes: Validate redirect and token issuance

claim_text: Portfolio examples are distinct in voice and layout
notes: No duplicated visual grammar across examples

claim_text: No internal ops language leaks to public pages
notes: Block AI-heavy or internal terms

claim_text: Delivery kits exist for each package deliverable
notes: Must include package-accurate templates

claim_text: Email handoff keeps brief links from being lost
notes: Promote to approved after production resend pass

claim_text: Checkout is one-time payment with no recurring subscription
notes: Keep pricing language synchronized with terms and Stripe products

claim_text: Included and not included deliverables are shown before Stripe
notes: Prevent hidden upsell behavior

claim_text: Revision policy is explicit before purchase
notes: Rounds and exclusions must remain clear

claim_text: Terms and privacy acceptance is required to continue to Stripe
notes: Checkbox consent must remain mandatory

claim_text: No employment or interview outcomes are guaranteed
notes: Must remain present on legal notes

claim_text: Customers can view live portfolios before paying
notes: Showcase links must stay accessible

claim_text: Launch and Accelerator include resume and LinkedIn alignment
notes: Must match package config and checkout

claim_text: Client keeps ownership of GitHub email LinkedIn and domain accounts
notes: Public copy cannot imply platform lock-in

claim_text: Scope is fixed at purchase with out-of-scope work requiring new quote
notes: Legal source of truth

claim_text: Delivery timeline begins after complete validated intake not payment alone
notes: Must match checkout and acceptance docs

claim_text: Target windows are Foundation 5 max 10 Launch 7 max 14 Accelerator 10 max 21 business days
notes: Timelines pause conditions defined in terms

claim_text: Revision rounds are Foundation 1 Launch 2 Accelerator 3
notes: Must remain aligned with package config

claim_text: Refund policy is stage-based before work after work and post-handoff
notes: Avoid ambiguous refund promises

claim_text: Delivery acceptance can occur by written approval or by elapsed no-dispute window
notes: Ensure terms language remains intact
